# papilov.org

> Personal research site of Artem Papilov. Open research at the intersection of technology, economics, and human behavior.

This site publishes long-form research articles with original analysis. Content is available in English, Russian, Spanish, German, and Chinese. All research is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.

## Research

- [The Price of Loyalty: Subscription Pricing Models](https://papilov.org/research/subscription-pricing-models/): Why Netflix raises prices every year while World of Warcraft hasn't in 21 years. An analytical deep dive into the economics, psychology, and strategic logic of subscription pricing.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://papilov.org/): Research index and author introduction
- [Work With Me](https://papilov.org/work-with-me/): Consulting and collaboration
- [Colophon](https://papilov.org/colophon/): How this site is built

## Author

- Name: Artem Papilov
- Email: artem@papilov.org
